title: Malformed downstream responses fail closed at the proven boundary

preconditions.description: The harness holds the inherited device-keyed lease before any device or fixture access.
The harness recorded session generation, display, layout, lock state, ATX-observable state, browser identity, and fixture identity.
The adapter can return malformed read data before mutation and malformed ATX data after a proven wire write.
The harness provisions each linked tool call with its valid owned session, required capability, and a separately captured fresh observation when the handler consumes one.

fault_script.action: Arm one malformed-before-request fault for jetkvm_display_capture.
fault_script.expected_effect: The read fails as DOWNSTREAM_MALFORMED_RESPONSE before any downstream request.

fault_script.action: Clear the pre-write capture fault.
fault_script.expected_effect: No later case inherits this fault.

fault_script.action: Arm one malformed-after-request fault for jetkvm_display_capture.
fault_script.expected_effect: The read request is sent and its malformed response fails closed with outcome null.

fault_script.action: Clear the post-write capture fault.
fault_script.expected_effect: No later case inherits this fault.

fault_script.expected_effect: No later case inherits this fault.

fault_script.action: Arm one malformed-after-request fault for jetkvm_input_keyboard.

fault_script.action: Clear the post-write keyboard fault without reopening the unknown gate.
fault_script.expected_effect: No later case inherits this fault and no replay occurs.

steps.expect: DOWNSTREAM_MALFORMED_RESPONSE read ToolError with phase execute, outcome null, verification none, safe_to_retry false, required_next_step reconnect_then_capture, and details.downstream_stage admission. Separately, adapter evidence records downstream request count 0, accepted write count 0, and no image block.
Clear and rebind before the post-write capture case, with zero replay.

DOWNSTREAM_MALFORMED_RESPONSE read ToolError with phase execute, outcome null, verification none, safe_to_retry false, required_next_step reconnect_then_capture, and details.downstream_stage acknowledgement. Separately, adapter evidence records downstream request count 1, malformed response count 1, zero replay writes, and no image block.
Inspect, release, and rebind before the next tool, with zero replay.

DOWNSTREAM_MALFORMED_RESPONSE read ToolError with phase execute, outcome null, verification none, safe_to_retry false, required_next_step reconnect_then_capture, and details.downstream_stage admission. Separately, adapter evidence records downstream request count 0 and accepted write count 0.
Clear and rebind before the post-write status case, with zero replay.

DOWNSTREAM_MALFORMED_RESPONSE read ToolError with phase execute, outcome null, verification none, safe_to_retry false, required_next_step reconnect_then_capture, and details.downstream_stage acknowledgement. Separately, adapter evidence records downstream request count 1, malformed response count 1, and zero replay writes.
Inspect, release, reconnect, and capture a fresh keyboard observation before the next tool, with zero replay.

DOWNSTREAM_MALFORMED_RESPONSE mutation ToolError with phase execute, outcome not_sent, verification none, safe_to_retry false, required_next_step reconnect_then_capture, null public action counts, and details.downstream_stage admission. Adapter evidence records zero downstream requests or writes.
Clear, rebind, and capture a fresh keyboard observation before the post-write case, with zero replay.

DOWNSTREAM_MALFORMED_RESPONSE mutation ToolError with phase execute, outcome unknown, verification none, safe_to_retry false, required_next_step inspect_device_state_before_retry, details.failed_action_index 0, details.dispatched_action_count 1, details.completed_action_count 0, and details.downstream_stage acknowledgement. The suffix and automatic replay are suppressed.
Inspect, release, reconnect, and capture a fresh mouse observation before the next tool, with zero replay.

DOWNSTREAM_MALFORMED_RESPONSE mutation ToolError with phase execute, outcome not_sent, verification none, safe_to_retry false, required_next_step reconnect_then_capture, null public action counts, and details.downstream_stage admission. Adapter evidence records zero downstream requests or writes.
Clear, rebind, and capture a fresh mouse observation before the post-write case, with zero replay.

DOWNSTREAM_MALFORMED_RESPONSE mutation ToolError with phase execute, outcome unknown, verification none, safe_to_retry false, required_next_step inspect_device_state_before_retry, details.failed_action_index 0, details.dispatched_action_count 1, details.completed_action_count 0, and details.downstream_stage acknowledgement. The suffix and automatic replay are suppressed.
Inspect, release, reconnect, and capture a fresh paste observation before the next tool, with zero replay.

DOWNSTREAM_MALFORMED_RESPONSE mutation ToolError with phase execute, outcome not_sent, verification none, safe_to_retry false, required_next_step reconnect_then_capture, null public action counts, and details.downstream_stage admission. Adapter evidence records zero downstream requests or writes.
Clear, rebind, and capture a fresh paste observation before the post-write case, with zero replay.

The unknown gate remains closed; adapter evidence records one request, one malformed response, and zero replay writes.
Inspect, release, and reconnect before the next tool, with zero replay.

DOWNSTREAM_MALFORMED_RESPONSE mutation ToolError with phase execute, outcome not_sent, verification none, safe_to_retry false, required_next_step reconnect_then_capture, null public action counts, and details.downstream_stage admission. Adapter evidence records zero downstream requests or writes.
Clear and rebind before the post-write release case, with zero replay.

The unknown gate remains closed; adapter evidence records one request, one malformed response, and zero replay writes.
Inspect, release, reconnect, and restore and re-prove the ATX baseline before the next tool, with zero replay.

DOWNSTREAM_MALFORMED_RESPONSE mutation ToolError with phase execute, outcome not_sent, verification none, safe_to_retry false, required_next_step reconnect_then_capture, null public action counts, and details.downstream_stage admission. Adapter evidence records zero downstream requests and zero ATX writes.
Clear, rebind, and restore and re-prove the ATX baseline before the post-write power case, with zero replay.

DOWNSTREAM_MALFORMED_RESPONSE mutation ToolError with phase execute, outcome unknown, verification none, safe_to_retry false, required_next_step inspect_device_state_before_retry, null public action counts, and details.downstream_stage acknowledgement. The unknown gate remains closed; adapter evidence records one ATX write, one malformed response, and zero replay writes.
Inspect and restore and re-prove the ATX baseline, then close the old session and prepare an unowned connect state, with zero replay.

DOWNSTREAM_MALFORMED_RESPONSE mutation ToolError with phase connect, outcome not_sent, verification none, safe_to_retry false, required_next_step none, null public action counts, and details.downstream_stage admission. Adapter evidence records zero downstream requests or writes.
Clear and re-prove an unowned connect state before the post-write connect case, with zero replay.

DOWNSTREAM_MALFORMED_RESPONSE mutation ToolError with phase connect, outcome unknown, verification none, safe_to_retry false, required_next_step inspect_device_state_before_retry, null public action counts, and details.downstream_stage acknowledgement. The unknown gate remains closed; adapter evidence records one connect request, one malformed response, and zero replay writes.
Inspect and clean uncertain connect publication, then establish a new current owned session, with zero replay.

DOWNSTREAM_MALFORMED_RESPONSE mutation ToolError with phase execute, outcome not_sent, verification none, safe_to_retry false, required_next_step reconnect_then_capture, null public action counts, and details.downstream_stage admission. Adapter evidence records zero downstream requests or writes.
Clear and rebind before the post-write reconnect case, with zero replay.

DOWNSTREAM_MALFORMED_RESPONSE mutation ToolError with phase execute, outcome unknown, verification none, safe_to_retry false, required_next_step inspect_device_state_before_retry, null public action counts, and details.downstream_stage acknowledgement. The unknown gate remains closed; adapter evidence records one reconnect request, one malformed response, and zero replay writes.
Inspect, release, and reconnect before the final read tool, with zero replay.

DOWNSTREAM_MALFORMED_RESPONSE read ToolError with phase execute, outcome null, verification none, safe_to_retry false, required_next_step reconnect_then_capture, and details.downstream_stage admission. Separately, adapter evidence records downstream request count 0 and accepted write count 0.
Clear and rebind before the post-write session-status case, with zero replay.

DOWNSTREAM_MALFORMED_RESPONSE read ToolError with phase execute, outcome null, verification none, safe_to_retry false, required_next_step reconnect_then_capture, and details.downstream_stage acknowledgement. Separately, adapter evidence records downstream request count 1, malformed response count 1, and zero replay writes.

pass.assertion: Each tool executes one malformed-before-request and one malformed-after-request case under separate one-shot faults. Mutations return exact not_sent then unknown envelopes; reads return DOWNSTREAM_MALFORMED_RESPONSE with outcome null and verification none at both boundaries.
Separate adapter telemetry proves zero requests and writes in every pre-boundary case, and one request plus one malformed response and zero replay writes in every post-boundary case.
Every one-shot fault is cleared before executable rebind or inspect-release-reconnect recovery establishes the next current session, required fresh observation, and restored ATX baseline.

evidence.source: The schema-validated read and mutation ToolError envelopes from each explicit ordered fake or replay call.
Ordered adapter telemetry separately proving pre/post request boundaries, zero replay, and completed clear-and-recovery transitions.

restore.action: Invoke generation-correlated emergency input release when a session exists.
restore.assertion: No held key, button, wheel producer, macro, or paste producer remains.

restore.action: Stop and join any Reliable Paste producer.
restore.assertion: Reliable Paste is inactive and its correlated producer is joined.

restore.action: Verify the fixture reports zero held keys and buttons.
restore.assertion: Held keyboard and pointer state is empty.

restore.action: Close only the device session created by this story and its browser resources.
restore.assertion: No story-owned browser, channel, or device session remains.

restore.action: Clear deterministic faults and restore the recorded fixture baseline.
restore.assertion: The next story starts only after the safe baseline is verified.

restore.action: Restore the recorded ATX-observable baseline using the reviewed fixture procedure while retaining the device lease.
restore.assertion: The baseline ATX-observable state is proven before the next story starts.

privacy.rule: Persist only allowlisted opaque identifiers, sanitized versions, counts, durations, hashes, outcomes, verification, and restoration results.
